case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. SUN D LEE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200021492) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200021492) AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN D SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-20-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-02-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, SUN D $6,812.89 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,107.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200021492)
AFFIDAVIT OF PLAINTIFF (TRANSACTION ID # 200021492) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001816), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED OCT-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN D
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 200021492) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200021492) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-02-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
